task: I need to leave a short note for a neighbor about a household matter, and I want to make sure the main point is easy to understand. Could you help me put it together in a plain way so it’s simple to read and doesn’t leave room for confusion?

turns.agent_response:
Certainly — here’s a plain, easy-to-read note:

---

Hi [Neighbor’s Name],

Just a quick note to let you know the water will be off for a little while this afternoon while a repair is being done. It should be back on later today.

If you need anything, please call or leave a note.

Thanks,  
[Your Name]

---

If you want, I can make it:
- more neighborly
- shorter
- specific to a different household matter

user_simulator.text: That’s clear enough. Plain and to the point. It says what needs saying without fuss.
